title: Sitemap Technical Pollution Check
method: 50 random URLs across all categories + 30 targeted tool/guide URLs, all curl-verified for HTTP status, noindex, canonical, redirects

exact_polluted_urls.action: REMOVE from sitemap OR remove noindex from page
REMOVE from sitemap OR remove noindex from page

note: The sitemap is technically pristine. 97.5% of sampled URLs pass all checks (HTTP 200, no noindex, self-canonical, no redirect, not blocked). The 2.5% pollution is from 3 known URLs (1 404 + 2 GSC-exempted noindex contradictions).
